name: laravel-vue-navigator
description: Ctrl+Click on an axios endpoint in a Vue file to jump directly to the Laravel controller method in a monorepo.
author: Danio Fiore

laravelVueNavigator.laravelPath.description: Path (relative to workspace) of the Laravel project root (where 'artisan' lives). Use 'auto' to auto-detect.

laravelVueNavigator.frontendPath.description: Path (relative to workspace) of the Vue/TS frontend project root. Use 'auto' to auto-detect.

laravelVueNavigator.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL prefix to prepend when an axios endpoint does not start with '/'. Example: '/api'.

laravelVueNavigator.phpBinary.description: PHP binary used to run 'artisan route:list --json'.

laravelVueNavigator.useArtisan.description: When true, route resolution prefers 'php artisan route:list --json'. When false, only the static parser is used.

laravelVueNavigator.routeCacheTtl.description: Seconds before the route cache on disk is considered stale (safety net; the file watcher refreshes routes earlier in normal conditions).

laravelVueNavigator.refreshDebounceMs.description: Milliseconds to debounce route refreshes when multiple PHP files are saved in a short window.

enumDescriptions: Show a non-invasive QuickPick listing the candidate Laravel routes (full URI + controller@method). The popup auto-closes on selection, Escape, or click outside.
Return every matching route as a definition and let VS Code display its native Peek panel (file paths + code snippets).
Silently navigate to the first/best match (legacy behavior). No warning is shown when multiple routes match.
laravelVueNavigator.ambiguityStrategy.description: How the extension behaves when an axios endpoint matches more than one Laravel route (typically when the URL contains a runtime expression that becomes '{param}').

enumDescriptions: Surface ambiguity only when two or more routes tie for the highest specificity score. Less specific fallbacks (e.g. catch-all '{any}' routes) are hidden if a more specific match exists.
Surface ambiguity whenever more than one route matches, even with different specificity scores. The most specific routes are listed first.
laravelVueNavigator.ambiguityScope.description: Which set of candidate routes the disambiguation UI should consider. Ignored when 'ambiguityStrategy' is 'first'.

commands.title: Laravel-Vue Navigator: Show route for endpoint under cursor
